/usr/bin/ar qc librave-vst-Assets.a "CMakeFiles/rave-vst-Assets.dir/juce_binarydata_rave-vst-Assets/JuceLibraryCode/BinaryData1.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/rave-vst-Assets.dir/juce_binarydata_rave-vst-Assets/JuceLibraryCode/BinaryData2.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/rave-vst-Assets.dir/juce_binarydata_rave-vst-Assets/JuceLibraryCode/BinaryData3.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/rave-vst-Assets.dir/juce_binarydata_rave-vst-Assets/JuceLibraryCode/BinaryData4.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/rave-vst-Assets.dir/juce_binarydata_rave-vst-Assets/JuceLibraryCode/BinaryData5.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/rave-vst-Assets.dir/juce_binarydata_rave-vst-Assets/JuceLibraryCode/BinaryData6.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/rave-vst-Assets.dir/juce_binarydata_rave-vst-Assets/JuceLibraryCode/BinaryData7.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/rave-vst-Assets.dir/juce_binarydata_rave-vst-Assets/JuceLibraryCode/BinaryData8.cpp.o"
/usr/bin/ranlib librave-vst-Assets.a
